headline: Vistra (VST) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Vistra (VST) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock down 3.4% over the past day and 0.3% over the past month. This has prompted closer scrutiny from investors. See our latest analysis for Vistra. Looking beyond the latest move, Vistra's share price has eased over the past quarter and year to date, while the very large 3 year and 5 year total shareholder returns point to a stock that has already rewarded patient investors.
